arguments.task: Visit Mailchimp's official developer pages and gather evidence about: API authentication methods, API types/surfaces (REST and/or GraphQL), access/pricing requirements for API use, rate limits, and any official or first-party mention of MCP or Model Context Protocol. Also inspect first-party Mailchimp pricing/access/help pages and official developer documentation pages linked from the site. Return a concise summary with the exact page URLs used as evidence and the relevant quoted facts.

input.thought: Use browser to inspect official Mailchimp developer and support pages for verifiable evidence.

raw_result.description: Email marketing and customer engagement platform with Marketing and Transactional developer APIs.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official Marketing API fundamentals state apps can authenticate with OAuth 2 or an API key. Official Transactional API fundamentals state requests use an API key in the JSON body. No evidence gathered for basic auth or bearer token auth.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official developer docs indicate a Mailchimp account is required for Marketing API access. Gathered evidence also indicates Mailchimp Transactional full access requires a Standard or Premium plan or direct signup, but Marketing API docs appear publicly self-serve without partner/admin gating.

api_surface.breadth: Mailchimp exposes at least two documented public API surfaces: the Marketing API (REST API v3.0) and the Transactional API, described in official docs as mostly RESTful while using POST for all calls.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official Mailchimp MCP or Model Context Protocol offering was found in the gathered evidence. This absence was not exhaustively verified beyond official-site searching, so treat as provisional.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Official Marketing API docs say the limit is 10 simultaneous connections and note Mailchimp does not throttle based on call volume. Transactional API rate-limit details were not conclusively verified from gathered evidence; docs reference hourly quota/account features signals instead.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official developer hub clearly separates Marketing and Transactional APIs. Marketing API docs explicitly document OAuth 2 and API key auth plus concrete concurrency limits. Transactional docs indicate a Mailchimp account is required and that full Transactional access requires Standard or Premium plan or direct signup, suggesting some capabilities may depend on paid tier.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Transactional API access tier and rate-limit specifics were only partially confirmed from gathered evidence, and MCP absence was not exhaustively validated beyond the inspected official pages.
